mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_chunks (doc_id, doc_name, chunk_index, chunk_text, embedding) VALUES (#{docId}, #{docName}, #{chunkIndex}, #{chunkText}, #{embedding})

INSERT INTO document_chunks (doc_id, doc_name, chunk_index, chunk_text, embedding) VALUES
(#{item.docId}, #{item.docName}, #{item.chunkIndex}, #{item.chunkText}, #{item.embedding})
mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_id, doc_name, chunk_index, chunk_text, embedding, create_time FROM document_chunks WHERE doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY chunk_index
SELECT id, doc_id, doc_name, chunk_index, chunk_text, embedding, create_time FROM document_chunks ORDER BY doc_id, chunk_index
SELECT DISTINCT doc_name FROM document_chunks ORDER BY doc_name
